title: A Resolution Respectfully Endorsing to the Honorable Wendel F. Avisado, Secretary, Department of Budget and Management the Programs, Projects and Activities (PPAS) of the Municipality of Los Baños Amounting to Fifty Million Pesos (P50,000.00 FOR FUNDING UNDER THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT SUPPORT FUND - OTHER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE TO LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS AS PER DBM LOCAL BUDGET CIRCULAR NO. 131 DATED JANUARY 8, 2021. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 06/22/2021)
